description_long: This object depicts a bald adult male seated with a relaxed posture, wearing a dark navy or black Columbia shirt. The figure's head is slightly tilted forward, and his facial expression is neutral and calm. The arms are resting naturally at the sides, and the back is straight, suggesting a comfortable seated position. The object is cropped at the mid-torso, with no visible lower body, legs, or wheelchair frame, wheels, or accessories. The surface texture of the shirt appears matte, while the skin has a slightly smoother finish. The overall form is solid and lifelike, with realistic skin tones and fabric folds.
description: A bald adult male in a dark shirt, seated upright with a calm expression and natural posture. No visible wheelchair frame or accessories are present.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, upper torso, and relaxed shoulders, with clear details of the shirt and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, ear, and the contour of the upper arm and shoulder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and broad shoulders, with the shirt's back fully visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the right arm's outline.
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with arms relaxed at the sides and torso straight.
